title: Common Questions
subtitle: FAQ
description: Everything you need to know about LE DÉSIR.

membership.a1: We offer Free, Silver (€19.99/mo), Gold (€39.99/mo) and Black VIP (€79.99/mo) tiers. Each tier unlocks additional content, marketplace discounts and community features.
membership.a2: Yes. You can cancel anytime from your dashboard. Your membership remains active until the end of the billing period.
membership.q3: How do I upgrade my membership?
membership.a3: Visit your dashboard and select Membership to upgrade at any time. The price difference is prorated.

marketplace.a1: Yes. All orders are shipped in plain, unmarked packaging with no indication of the contents or sender name.
marketplace.a2: We accept returns within 30 days for unopened, unused products.
marketplace.a3: Yes, we ship to most European countries and selected international markets.

payments.q1: What payment methods do you accept?
payments.a1: We accept PayPal, Visa, Mastercard and USDT. All transactions are encrypted and secure.
payments.q2: Will LE DÉSIR appear on my bank statement?
payments.a2: Charges appear under a discreet billing name, not LE DÉSIR.

account.a1: We use industry-standard encryption. We never sell personal data to third parties.
account.q2: How do I delete my account?
account.a2: You can request account deletion from Settings > Security. Data is purged within 30 days.
